name: IMMZD5DTBCGEncounterElements
title: IMMZD5DTBCGEncounterElements
description: This library defines encounter-based elements for BCG used throughout the Immunization CPG

parameter.name: Draft Medication Request for BCG dose
The client has history of severe allergic reactions
The client is exposed to immunosuppressive treatment
Client's age is less than 1 year
Client's age is more than or equal to 1 year
